overall.description: Spider-Man crouches on a building ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square intersection at sunset. The scene features illuminated digital billboards, flowing traffic with yellow taxis, and warm golden hour lighting. Third-person game engine footage from a stationary vantage point above the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: Times Square intersection with massive digital billboards

events.description: white delivery truck drives down the street from foreground to background

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouches on a building ledge in a predatory stance, surveying the traffic and pedestrians below while preparing for movement

notable_agents.action: Spider-Man perched on building ledge, shifting weight and adjusting crouch position
yellow taxi cab driving away from camera down the avenue

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'BUMPY SAINTS' advertisement with purple and white color scheme
illuminated digital billboard with 'COLEXCO' branding in red and white
massive red digital billboard displaying 'INTENSE & PERSONAL' text with white typography
tall skyscraper covered in multiple digital screens extending into the golden sky

segments.scene_description: From an elevated perch on a building ledge, Spider-Man observes the bustling Times Square intersection below during a vibrant sunset. The scene is dominated by massive illuminated digital billboards on all sides, casting colorful light onto the multi-lane street where taxis and trucks flow continuously. The warm golden hour sky contrasts with the artificial neon glow of the advertisements, creating a cinematic urban atmosphere typical of the game's recreation of New York City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective that captures the vibrant intersection of Times Square as the natural light of sunset blends with artificial neon. It begins from a high perch on a building ledge, where Spider-Man overlooks the dense urban activity below. As the camera lingers, the warm golden hour sky contrasts with the massive, illuminated digital billboards that cast colorful glows across the multi-lane street. The scene then settles into the cinematic atmosphere of the city, focusing on the continuous flow of yellow taxis and trucks moving through the neon-lit canyon.
